sources.manufacturerUrl: viltrox.com/collections/cine-lenses (tier-1; individual product page URL not accessible during research)
sources.weightG: newsshooter.com / CineD citing manufacturer: ~15 kg = 15,000g. newsshooter.com / CineD first-look citing manufacturer specs (tier-3)
sources.lengthMm: CineD first-look citing manufacturer: 511mm. newsshooter.com / CineD first-look citing manufacturer specs (tier-3)
sources.frontDiameterMm: newsshooter.com hands-on: 165mm front diameter. newsshooter.com / CineD first-look citing manufacturer specs (tier-3)
sources.closeFocusM: newsshooter.com hands-on: 4 ft 2 in = 1.26m. newsshooter.com / CineD first-look citing manufacturer specs (tier-3)
sources.introductionYear: Announced / launched 2024. newsshooter.com / CineD first-look citing manufacturer specs (tier-3)
sources.imageCircleMm: CineD first-look: 46.5mm image circle (covers ARRI LF, RED VV, full frame). newsshooter.com / CineD first-look citing manufacturer specs (tier-3)
sources.opticalElements: Not disclosed by Viltrox in accessible documentation
sources.filterType: newsshooter.com: rear filter slot confirmed; no front filter thread. newsshooter.com / CineD first-look citing manufacturer specs (tier-3)
sources.filterThreadMm: Rear slot system; no thread size specified
sources.isParfocal: Viltrox explicitly confirms parfocal design. newsshooter.com / CineD first-look citing manufacturer specs (tier-3)
sources.hasFocusBreathing: Not explicitly stated in accessible documentation
sources.gearPitch: Viltrox: 0.8 MOD (focus, iris, zoom). newsshooter.com / CineD first-look citing manufacturer specs (tier-3)
